title: Amazing phone!
body: The Galaxy S25 Ultra exceeded my expectations. Fast, beautiful display, and great camera.

title: Battery life is disappointing
body: Expected more from the battery. Needs charging twice a day.

title: Best Android flagship
body: Performance is top-notch. No lag, and gaming is smooth.

title: Camera quality is superb
body: Photos are crisp and vibrant, even in low light.

title: Too expensive
body: Good phone but price is too high for the features offered.
